Built with Alectryon. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
From HoTT Require Import Basics.From HoTT Require Import Basics.
Require Import Cubical.DPath.
Require Import Cubical.PathSquare.
Require Import Cubical.DPathSquare.
Require Import Types.Paths Types.Prod.

Declare Scope cube_scope.
Delimit Scope cube_scope with cube.
Local Unset Elimination Schemes.
Generalizable All Variables.

Local Open Scope square_scope.

(*
x001----pi01----x101              x001----pi01----x101
 |  \               \              |               |  \
 |  p00i  ==si0i=>  p10i           |               |  p10i
p0i1  \               \           p0i1 ==sii1=>   p1i1  \
 |    x000----pi00----x100         |               |    x100
 |s0ii |               |    ===>   |               | s1ii|
x011   |               |          x011----pi11----x111   |
  \   p0i0  ==sii0=>  p1i0          \               \   p1i0
 p01i  |               |           p01i  ==si1i=>  p11i  |
     \ |               |               \               \ |
      x010----pi10----x110              x010----pi10----x110
 *)

(** Contents:
  * Definition of [PathCube]
  * [PathCube] reflexivity
  * [PathCube] face rewriting
  * [PathCube]s from paths between squares
  * [PathCube]s from squares
  * [PathCube] flipping
  * Kan fillers
  * [PathCube] concatenation
  * natural cubes from [ap]
*)


(** Homogeneous cubes *)
(** PathCube left right top bottom front back *)
Cumulative Inductive PathCube {A}
  : forall x000 {x010 x100 x110 x001 x011 x101 x111 : A}
  {p0i0 : x000 = x010} {p1i0 : x100 = x110} {pi00 : x000 = x100}
  {pi10 : x010 = x110} {p0i1 : x001 = x011} {p1i1 : x101 = x111}
  {pi01 : x001 = x101} {pi11 : x011 = x111} {p00i : x000 = x001}
  {p01i : x010 = x011} {p10i : x100 = x101} {p11i : x110 = x111}
  (s0ii : PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i) (s1ii : PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i)
  (sii0 : PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10) (sii1 : PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11)
  (si0i : PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01) (si1i : PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11), Type
  := idcube : forall x, PathCube x 1 1 1 1 1 1.

Arguments PathCube {_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _}.

(* TODO: ": rename" is needed because the default names changed in Rocq 9.2.0.  When the minimum supported version is >= 9.2.0, the ": rename" can be removed. *)
Scheme PathCube_ind := Induction for PathCube Sort Type.
Arguments PathCube_ind {A} P f
  {_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _} : rename.

(* TODO: ": rename" is needed because the default names changed in Rocq 9.2.0.  When the minimum supported version is >= 9.2.0, the ": rename" can be removed. *)
Scheme PathCube_rec := Minimality for PathCube Sort Type.
Arguments PathCube_rec {A} P f
  {_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _} : rename.

(* These notations make it easier to write our lemmas *)
Local Notation hr := (sq_refl_h _).
Local Notation vr := (sq_refl_v _).
Local Notation tr := sq_tr.
Local Notation fv := sq_flip_v.

(** [PathCube]s form a path of squares up to retyping *)

A: Type
x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111
p00i: x000 = x001
p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
tr (fv s0ii) @@h (si0i @@h tr s1ii) =
sq_ccGG (moveL_Vp (pi00 @ p1i0) pi10 p0i0 (sq_path^-1 sii0))
  (moveL_Vp (pi01 @ p1i1) pi11 p0i1 (sq_path^-1 sii1)) si1i <~>
PathCube s0ii s1ii sii0 sii1 si0i si1i


A: Type
x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111
p00i: x000 = x001
p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
tr (fv s0ii) @@h (si0i @@h tr s1ii) =
sq_ccGG (moveL_Vp (pi00 @ p1i0) pi10 p0i0 (sq_path^-1 sii0))
  (moveL_Vp (pi01 @ p1i1) pi11 p0i1 (sq_path^-1 sii1)) si1i <~>
PathCube s0ii s1ii sii0 sii1 si0i si1i

  
A: Type
x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111
p00i: x000 = x001
p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
tr (fv s0ii) @@h (si0i @@h tr s1ii) =
sq_ccGG (moveL_Vp (pi00 @ p1i0) pi10 p0i0 (sq_path^-1 sii0))
  (moveL_Vp (pi01 @ p1i1) pi11 p0i1 (sq_path^-1 sii1)) si1i ->
PathCube s0ii s1ii sii0 sii1 si0i si1i

x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111
p00i: x000 = x001
p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11

PathCube s0ii s1ii sii0 sii1 si0i si1i ->
tr (fv s0ii) @@h (si0i @@h tr s1ii) =
sq_ccGG (moveL_Vp (pi00 @ p1i0) pi10 p0i0 (sq_path^-1 sii0))
  (moveL_Vp (pi01 @ p1i1) pi11 p0i1 (sq_path^-1 sii1)) si1i

x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100

p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111
p00i: x000 = x001
p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
?f o ?g == idmap

p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100

p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111

pi11: x011 = x111

p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11

A: Type
x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111
p00i: x000 = x001
p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
tr (fv s0ii) @@h (si0i @@h tr s1ii) =
sq_ccGG (moveL_Vp (pi00 @ p1i0) pi10 p0i0 (sq_path^-1 sii0))
  (moveL_Vp (pi01 @ p1i1) pi11 p0i1 (sq_path^-1 sii1)) si1i ->
PathCube s0ii s1ii sii0 sii1 si0i si1i
 
A: Type
x, x0: A
p00i, p01i, p10i, p11i: x = x0
s0ii: PathSquare 1 1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare 1 1 p10i p11i
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i 1 1
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i 1 1
PathSquare.tr
  (match
     p01i as p in (_ = a)
     return
       (forall px1 : a = x0, 1 @ p00i = p @ px1 -> PathSquare 1 px1 p p00i)
   with
   | 1%path =>
       fun px1 : x = x0 =>
       match
         p00i as p in (_ = a)
         return (forall px2 : x = a, 1 @ p = 1 @ px2 -> PathSquare 1 px2 1 p)
       with
       | 1%path =>
           fun (px2 : x = x) (e : 1%path = 1 @ px2) =>
           match
             e @ concat_1p px2 in (_ = p)
             return (1%path = 1 @ p -> PathSquare 1 p 1 1)
           with
           | 1%path => fun _ : 1%path = 1%path => 1
           end e
       end px1
   end 1%path
     ((concat_1p p00i @
       ((((concat_1p p01i)^ @
          (match
             s0ii in (@PathSquare _ a00 a10 a01 a11 p p0 p1 p2)
             return (p @ p2 = p1 @ p0)
           with
           | @sq_id _ x1 => 1
           end @ ((concat_p1 p00i)^)^))^)^)^) @
      (concat_p1 p01i)^)) @@h
(si0i @@h PathSquare.tr s1ii) = si1i -> PathCube s0ii s1ii 1 1 si0i si1i

    
A: Type
x, x0: A
p00i, p01i, p10i, p11i: x = x0
s0ii: PathSquare 1 1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare 1 1 p10i p11i
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i 1 1
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i 1 1
PathSquare.tr
  (match
     p01i as p in (_ = a)
     return
       (forall px1 : a = x0, 1 @ p00i = p @ px1 -> PathSquare 1 px1 p p00i)
   with
   | 1%path =>
       fun px1 : x = x0 =>
       match
         p00i as p in (_ = a)
         return (forall px2 : x = a, 1 @ p = 1 @ px2 -> PathSquare 1 px2 1 p)
       with
       | 1%path =>
           fun (px2 : x = x) (e : 1%path = 1 @ px2) =>
           match
             e @ concat_1p px2 in (_ = p)
             return (1%path = 1 @ p -> PathSquare 1 p 1 1)
           with
           | 1%path => fun _ : 1%path = 1%path => 1
           end e
       end px1
   end 1%path
     ((concat_1p p00i @
       ((((concat_1p p01i)^ @
          (match
             sq_1G (sq_1G^-1 s0ii) in
             (@PathSquare _ a00 a10 a01 a11 p p0 p1 p2)
             return (p @ p2 = p1 @ p0)
           with
           | @sq_id _ x1 => 1
           end @ ((concat_p1 p00i)^)^))^)^)^) @
      (concat_p1 p01i)^)) @@h
(sq_G1 (sq_G1^-1 si0i) @@h PathSquare.tr (sq_1G (sq_1G^-1 s1ii))) = si1i ->
PathCube (sq_1G (sq_1G^-1 s0ii)) (sq_1G (sq_1G^-1 s1ii)) 1 1
  (sq_G1 (sq_G1^-1 si0i)) si1i

    
A: Type
x, x0: A
p00i, p01i, p10i, p11i: x = x0
s0ii: PathSquare 1 1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare 1 1 p10i p11i
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i 1 1
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i 1 1
X: PathSquare.tr
  (match
     p01i as p in (_ = a)
     return
       (forall px1 : a = x0, 1 @ p00i = p @ px1 -> PathSquare 1 px1 p p00i)
   with
   | 1%path =>
       fun px1 : x = x0 =>
       match
         p00i as p in (_ = a)
         return (forall px0 : x = a, 1 @ p = 1 @ px0 -> PathSquare 1 px0 1 p)
       with
       | 1%path =>
           fun (px0 : x = x) (e : 1%path = 1 @ px0) =>
           match
             e @ concat_1p px0 in (_ = p)
             return (1%path = 1 @ p -> PathSquare 1 p 1 1)
           with
           | 1%path => fun _ : 1%path = 1%path => 1
           end e
       end px1
   end 1%path
     ((concat_1p p00i @
       ((((concat_1p p01i)^ @
          (match
             sq_1G (sq_1G^-1 s0ii) in
             (@PathSquare _ a00 a10 a01 a11 p p0 p1 p2)
             return (p @ p2 = p1 @ p0)
           with
           | @sq_id _ x1 => 1
           end @ ((concat_p1 p00i)^)^))^)^)^) @
      (concat_p1 p01i)^)) @@h
(sq_G1 (sq_G1^-1 si0i) @@h PathSquare.tr (sq_1G (sq_1G^-1 s1ii))) = si1i
PathCube (sq_1G (sq_1G^-1 s0ii)) (sq_1G (sq_1G^-1 s1ii)) 1 1
  (sq_G1 (sq_G1^-1 si0i)) si1i

    by destruct (sq_G1^-1 si0i), (sq_1G^-1 s0ii),
      (sq_1G^-1 s1ii), X, p00i. 
A: Type
x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111
p00i: x000 = x001
p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
PathCube s0ii s1ii sii0 sii1 si0i si1i ->
tr (fv s0ii) @@h (si0i @@h tr s1ii) =
sq_ccGG (moveL_Vp (pi00 @ p1i0) pi10 p0i0 (sq_path^-1 sii0))
  (moveL_Vp (pi01 @ p1i1) pi11 p0i1 (sq_path^-1 sii1)) si1i
A: Type
x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111
p00i: x000 = x001
p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
match
  sii0 as p3 in (@PathSquare _ a00 a10 a01 a11 p p0 p1 p2)
  return
    (forall (p00i0 : a00 = x001) (p01i0 : a10 = x011) 
     (p10i0 : a01 = x101) (p11i0 : a11 = x111)
     (s0ii0 : PathSquare p p0i1 p00i0 p01i0)
     (s1ii0 : PathSquare p0 p1i1 p10i0 p11i0)
     (si0i0 : PathSquare p00i0 p10i0 p1 pi01)
     (si1i0 : PathSquare p01i0 p11i0 p2 pi11),
     tr (fv s0ii0) @@h (si0i0 @@h tr s1ii0) =
     sq_ccGG (moveL_Vp (p1 @ p0) p2 p (sq_path^-1 p3))
       (moveL_Vp (pi01 @ p1i1) pi11 p0i1 (sq_path^-1 sii1)) si1i0 ->
     PathCube s0ii0 s1ii0 p3 sii1 si0i0 si1i0)
with
| @sq_id _ x =>
    (fun (x0 : A) (p00i0 : x0 = x001) (p01i0 : x0 = x011) 
       (p10i0 : x0 = x101) (p11i0 : x0 = x111)
       (s0ii0 : PathSquare 1 p0i1 p00i0 p01i0)
       (s1ii0 : PathSquare 1 p1i1 p10i0 p11i0)
       (si0i0 : PathSquare p00i0 p10i0 1 pi01)
       (si1i0 : PathSquare p01i0 p11i0 1 pi11) =>
     match
       sii1 as p3 in (@PathSquare _ a00 a10 a01 a11 p p0 p1 p2)
       return
         (forall (p00i1 : x0 = a00) (p01i1 : x0 = a10) 
          (p10i1 : x0 = a01) (p11i1 : x0 = a11)
          (s0ii1 : PathSquare 1 p p00i1 p01i1)
          (s1ii1 : PathSquare 1 p0 p10i1 p11i1)
          (si0i1 : PathSquare p00i1 p10i1 1 p1)
          (si1i1 : PathSquare p01i1 p11i1 1 p2),
          tr (fv s0ii1) @@h (si0i1 @@h tr s1ii1) =
          sq_ccGG (moveL_Vp (1 @ 1) 1 1 (sq_path^-1 1))
            (moveL_Vp (p1 @ p0) p2 p (sq_path^-1 p3)) si1i1 ->
          PathCube s0ii1 s1ii1 1 p3 si0i1 si1i1)
     with
     | @sq_id _ x1 =>
         (fun (x2 : A) (p00i1 p01i1 p10i1 p11i1 : x0 = x2)
            (s0ii1 : PathSquare 1 1 p00i1 p01i1)
            (s1ii1 : PathSquare 1 1 p10i1 p11i1)
            (si0i1 : PathSquare p00i1 p10i1 1 1)
            (si1i1 : PathSquare p01i1 p11i1 1 1) =>
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (fun si0i2 : PathSquare p00i1 p10i1 1 1 =>
             PathSquare.tr
               (match
                  p01i1 as p in (_ = a)
                  return
                    (forall px1 : a = x2,
                     1 @ p00i1 = p @ px1 -> PathSquare 1 px1 p p00i1)
                with
                | 1%path =>
                    fun px1 : x0 = x2 =>
                    match
                      p00i1 as p in (_ = a)
                      return
                        (forall px2 : x0 = a,
                         1 @ p = 1 @ px2 -> PathSquare 1 px2 1 p)
                    with
                    | 1%path =>
                        fun (px2 : x0 = x0) (e : 1%path = 1 @ px2) =>
                        match
                          e @ concat_1p px2 in (_ = p)
                          return (1%path = 1 @ p -> PathSquare 1 p 1 1)
                        with
                        | 1%path => fun _ : 1%path = 1%path => 1
                        end e
                    end px1
                end 1%path
                  ((concat_1p p00i1 @
                    ((((concat_1p p01i1)^ @
                       (match
                          s0ii1 in (@PathSquare _ a00 a10 a01 a11 p p0 p1 p2)
                          return (p @ p2 = p1 @ p0)
                        with
                        | @sq_id _ x3 => 1
                        end @ ((concat_p1 p00i1)^)^))^)^)^) @
                   (concat_p1 p01i1)^)) @@h
             (si0i2 @@h PathSquare.tr s1ii1) = si1i1 ->
             PathCube s0ii1 s1ii1 1 1 si0i2 si1i1)
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (fun s0ii2 : PathSquare 1 1 p00i1 p01i1 =>
                PathSquare.tr
                  (match
                     p01i1 as p in (_ = a)
                     return
                       (forall px1 : a = x2,
                        1 @ p00i1 = p @ px1 -> PathSquare 1 px1 p p00i1)
                   with
                   | 1%path =>
                       fun px1 : x0 = x2 =>
                       match
                         p00i1 as p in (_ = a)
                         return
                           (forall px2 : x0 = a,
                            1 @ p = 1 @ px2 -> PathSquare 1 px2 1 p)
                       with
                       | 1%path =>
                           fun (px2 : x0 = x0) (e : 1%path = 1 @ px2) =>
                           match
                             e @ concat_1p px2 in (_ = p)
                             return (1%path = 1 @ p -> PathSquare 1 p 1 1)
                           with
                           | 1%path => fun _ : 1%path = 1%path => 1
                           end e
                       end px1

                                (sq_G1 1%path) si1i2)
                         with
                         | 1%path =>
                             fun (s0ii2 : PathSquare 1 1 p00i1 p00i1)
                               (si1i2 : PathSquare p00i1 p11i1 1 1)
                               (X1 : PathSquare.tr
                                       (match
                                          p00i1 as p1 in (_ = a)
                                          return (forall px1 : ..., ...)
                                        with
                                        | 1%path => fun px1 : ... => ...
                                        end 1%path 
                                          ((... @ ...) @ ...^)) @@h
                                     (sq_G1 1%path @@h
                                      PathSquare.tr (sq_1G (...^-1 ...))) =
                                     si1i2) =>
                             let p1 := sq_1G^-1 s1ii2 in
                             match
                               p1 as p3 in (_ = p2)
                               return
                                 (PathSquare 1 1 p00i1 p2 ->
                                  forall si1i3 : PathSquare ... ... ... ...,
                                  ... -> ...)
                             with
                             | 1%path =>
                                 fun (s1ii3 : PathSquare 1 1 p00i1 p00i1)
                                   (si1i3 : PathSquare ... ... ... ...)
                                   (X2 : ...) =>
                                 ...
                             end s1ii2 si1i2 X1
                         end s0ii1 si1i1 X0
                     end s1ii1 si0i1 X)
                    (eisretr sq_1G s1ii1)^)
                 (eisretr sq_1G s0ii1)^)
              (eisretr sq_G1 si0i1)^
            :
            tr (fv s0ii1) @@h (si0i1 @@h tr s1ii1) =
            sq_ccGG (moveL_Vp (1 @ 1) 1 1 (sq_path^-1 1))
              (moveL_Vp (1 @ 1) 1 1 (sq_path^-1 1)) si1i1 ->
            PathCube s0ii1 s1ii1 1 1 si0i1 si1i1) x1
       end p00i0 p01i0 p10i0 p11i0 s0ii0 s1ii0 si0i0 si1i0) x
  end p00i p01i p10i p11i s0ii s1ii si0i si1i ==

A: Type
x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A

p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111

p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i

sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
(fun X : PathCube s0ii s1ii sii0 sii1 si0i si1i =>
 match
   X in
   (@PathCube _ x0001 x00 x0 x1 x0002 x002 x2 x3 p0i2 p1i2 pi001 pi0 p0i3
    p1i3 pi002 pi1 p00i0 p01i0 p10i0 p11i0 s0ii0 s1ii0 sii2 sii3 si0i0 si1i0)
   return
     (tr (fv s0ii0) @@h (si0i0 @@h tr s1ii0) =
      sq_ccGG (moveL_Vp (pi001 @ p1i2) pi0 p0i2 (sq_path^-1 sii2))
        (moveL_Vp (pi002 @ p1i3) pi1 p0i3 (sq_path^-1 sii3)) si1i0)
 with
 | idcube x => (fun x0 : A => 1%path) x
 end)
o match
    sii0 as p3 in (@PathSquare _ a00 a10 a01 a11 p p0 p1 p2)
    return
      (forall (p00i0 : a00 = x001) (p01i0 : a10 = x011) 
       (p10i0 : a01 = x101) (p11i0 : a11 = x111)
       (s0ii0 : PathSquare p p0i1 p00i0 p01i0)
       (s1ii0 : PathSquare p0 p1i1 p10i0 p11i0)
       (si0i0 : PathSquare p00i0 p10i0 p1 pi01)
       (si1i0 : PathSquare p01i0 p11i0 p2 pi11),
       tr (fv s0ii0) @@h (si0i0 @@h tr s1ii0) =
       sq_ccGG (moveL_Vp (p1 @ p0) p2 p (sq_path^-1 p3))
         (moveL_Vp (pi01 @ p1i1) pi11 p0i1 (sq_path^-1 sii1)) si1i0 ->
       PathCube s0ii0 s1ii0 p3 sii1 si0i0 si1i0)
  with
  | @sq_id _ x =>
      (fun (x0 : A) (p00i0 : x0 = x001) (p01i0 : x0 = x011)
         (p10i0 : x0 = x101) (p11i0 : x0 = x111)
         (s0ii0 : PathSquare 1 p0i1 p00i0 p01i0)
         (s1ii0 : PathSquare 1 p1i1 p10i0 p11i0)
         (si0i0 : PathSquare p00i0 p10i0 1 pi01)
         (si1i0 : PathSquare p01i0 p11i0 1 pi11) =>
       match
         sii1 as p3 in (@PathSquare _ a00 a10 a01 a11 p p0 p1 p2)
         return
           (forall (p00i1 : x0 = a00) (p01i1 : x0 = a10) 
            (p10i1 : x0 = a01) (p11i1 : x0 = a11)
            (s0ii1 : PathSquare 1 p p00i1 p01i1)
            (s1ii1 : PathSquare 1 p0 p10i1 p11i1)
            (si0i1 : PathSquare p00i1 p10i1 1 p1)
            (si1i1 : PathSquare p01i1 p11i1 1 p2),
            tr (fv s0ii1) @@h (si0i1 @@h tr s1ii1) =
            sq_ccGG (moveL_Vp (1 @ 1) 1 1 (sq_path^-1 1))
              (moveL_Vp (p1 @ p0) p2 p (sq_path^-1 p3)) si1i1 ->
            PathCube s0ii1 s1ii1 1 p3 si0i1 si1i1)
       with
       | @sq_id _ x1 =>
           (fun (x2 : A) (p00i1 p01i1 p10i1 p11i1 : x0 = x2)
              (s0ii1 : PathSquare 1 1 p00i1 p01i1)
              (s1ii1 : PathSquare 1 1 p10i1 p11i1)
              (si0i1 : PathSquare p00i1 p10i1 1 1)
              (si1i1 : PathSquare p01i1 p11i1 1 1) =>
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (fun si0i2 : PathSquare p00i1 p10i1 1 1 =>
               PathSquare.tr
                 (match
                    p01i1 as p in (_ = a)
                    return
                      (forall px1 : a = x2,
                       1 @ p00i1 = p @ px1 -> PathSquare 1 px1 p p00i1)
                  with
                  | 1%path =>
                      fun px1 : x0 = x2 =>
                      match
                        p00i1 as p in (_ = a)
                        return
                          (forall px2 : x0 = a,
                           1 @ p = 1 @ px2 -> PathSquare 1 px2 1 p)
                      with
                      | 1%path =>
                          fun (px2 : x0 = x0) (e : 1%path = 1 @ px2) =>
                          match
                            e @ concat_1p px2 in (_ = p)
                            return (1%path = 1 @ p -> PathSquare 1 p 1 1)
                          with
                          | 1%path => fun _ : 1%path = 1%path => 1
                          end e
                      end px1
                  end 1%path
                    ((concat_1p p00i1 @
                      ((((concat_1p p01i1)^ @
                         (match
                            s0ii1 in
                            (@PathSquare _ a00 a10 a01 a11 p p0 p1 p2)
                            return (p @ p2 = p1 @ p0)
                          with
                          | @sq_id _ x3 => 1
                          end @ ((concat_p1 p00i1)^)^))^)^)^) @
                     (concat_p1 p01i1)^)) @@h
               (si0i2 @@h PathSquare.tr s1ii1) = si1i1 ->
               PathCube s0ii1 s1ii1 1 1 si0i2 si1i1)
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (fun s0ii2 : PathSquare 1 1 p00i1 p01i1 =>
                  PathSquare.tr
                    (match
                       p01i1 as p in (_ = a)
                       return
                         (forall px1 : a = x2,
                          1 @ p00i1 = p @ px1 -> PathSquare 1 px1 p p00i1)
                     with

                         fun px1 : x0 = x2 =>
                         match

                       ((concat_1p p00i1 @
                         ((((concat_1p p01i1)^ @

                            match

                          ((concat_1p p00i1 @

                                  (@PathSquare _ a00 a10 a01 a11 p p0 p1 p2)
                                  return (p @ p2 = p1 @ p0)
                                with
                                | @sq_id _ x3 => 1
                                end @ ((concat_p1 p00i1)^)^))^)^)^) @
                           (concat_p1 p01i1)^)) @@h
                     (sq_G1 (sq_G1^-1 si0i1) @@h PathSquare.tr s1ii2) = si1i1 ->
                     PathCube (sq_1G (sq_1G^-1 s0ii1)) s1ii2 1 1
                       (sq_G1 (sq_G1^-1 si0i1)) si1i1)
                    (fun
                       X : PathSquare.tr
                             (match
                                p01i1 as p in (_ = a)
                                return
                                  (forall px1 : a = x2,
                                   1 @ p00i1 = p @ px1 ->

                              with
                              | 1%path =>

                                  match

                                    return
                                      (forall px2 : x0 = a,
                                       1 @ p = 1 @ px2 ->
                                       PathSquare 1 px2 1 p)
                                  with

                                      fun (px2 : x0 = x0)
                                        (e : 1%path = 1 @ px2) =>

                                      with

                              end 1%path
                                ((concat_1p p00i1 @
                                  ((((concat_1p p01i1)^ @

                                        (@PathSquare _ a00 a10 a01 a11 p p0
                                         p1 p2)
                                        return (p @ p2 = p1 @ p0)
                                      with

                                      end @ ((concat_p1 p00i1)^)^))^)^)^) @

                           (sq_G1 (sq_G1^-1 si0i1) @@h
                            PathSquare.tr (sq_1G (sq_1G^-1 s1ii1))) =
                           si1i1 =>
                     let p := sq_G1^-1 si0i1 in
                     match
                       p as p1 in (_ = p0)
                       return
                         (forall s1ii2 : PathSquare 1 1 p0 p11i1,
                          PathSquare p00i1 p0 1 1 ->
                          PathSquare.tr
                            (match
                               p01i1 as p2 in (_ = a)
                               return

                                  PathSquare 1 px1 p2 p00i1)
                             with

                                 fun px1 : x0 = x2 =>
                                 match
                                   p00i1 as p2 in (_ = a)
                                   return

                                      ... @ ... = ... @ ... ->
                                      PathSquare 1 px2 1 p2)
                                 with

                                       (e : 1%path = ... @ ...) =>
                                     match ... in (_ = p2) return ... with
                                     | 1%path => ...
                                     end e
                                 end px1
                             end 1%path
                               ((concat_1p p00i1 @
                                 ((((concat_1p ...)^ @
                                    (match
                                       ... in

                                        p4 p5)
                                       return ...
                                     with
                                     | @sq_id _ x3 => ...
                                     end @ ...^))^)^)^) @
                                (concat_p1 p01i1)^)) @@h
                          (sq_G1 p1 @@h
                           PathSquare.tr (sq_1G (sq_1G^-1 s1ii2))) =
                          si1i1 ->
                          PathCube (sq_1G (sq_1G^-1 s0ii1))
                            (sq_1G (sq_1G^-1 s1ii2)) 1 1 
                            (sq_G1 p1) si1i1)
                     with
                     | 1%path =>
                         fun (s1ii2 : PathSquare 1 1 p00i1 p11i1)
                           (si0i2 : PathSquare p00i1 p00i1 1 1)
                           (X0 : PathSquare.tr
                                   (match
                                      p01i1 as p0 in (_ = a)
                                      return
                                        (forall px1 : a = x2,
                                         1 @ p00i1 = p0 @ px1 ->
                                         PathSquare 1 px1 p0 p00i1)
                                    with
                                    | 1%path =>
                                        fun px1 : x0 = x2 =>
                                        match
                                          p00i1 as p0 in (_ = a)
                                          return
                                            (forall 
                                             px2 : x0 = a,
                                             ... @ ... = ... @ ... ->
                                             PathSquare 1 px2 1 p0)
                                        with
                                        | 1%path =>
                                            fun (px2 : x0 = x0)
                                              (e : 1%path = ... @ ...) =>
                                            match
                                              ... in (_ = p0) return ...
                                            with
                                            | 1%path => ...
                                            end e
                                        end px1
                                    end 1%path
                                      ((concat_1p p00i1 @
                                        ((((concat_1p ...)^ @
                                           (match

                                               p0 p1 p2 p3)
                                              return ...
                                            with
                                            | @sq_id _ x3 => ...
                                            end @ ...^))^)^)^) @
                                       (concat_p1 p01i1)^)) @@h
                                 (sq_G1 1%path @@h
                                  PathSquare.tr (sq_1G (sq_1G^-1 s1ii2))) =
                                 si1i1) =>
                         let p0 := sq_1G^-1 s0ii1 in
                         match
                           p0 as p2 in (_ = p1)
                           return
                             (PathSquare 1 1 p00i1 p1 ->
                              forall si1i2 : PathSquare p1 p11i1 1 1,
                              PathSquare.tr
                                (match
                                   p1 as p3 in (_ = a)
                                   return (forall px1 : ..., ...)
                                 with
                                 | 1%path => fun px1 : ... => ...
                                 end 1%path ((... @ ...) @ ...^)) @@h
                              (sq_G1 1%path @@h
                               PathSquare.tr (sq_1G (...^-1 ...))) =
                              si1i2 ->
                              PathCube (sq_1G p2) 
                                (sq_1G (sq_1G^-1 s1ii2)) 1 1 
                                (sq_G1 1%path) si1i2)
                         with

                               (si1i2 : PathSquare p00i1 p11i1 1 1)
                               (X1 : PathSquare.tr

                                          p00i1 as p1 in (_ = a)
                                          return (forall px1 : ..., ...)
                                        with

                                        end 1%path

                                      PathSquare.tr (sq_1G (...^-1 ...))) =
                                     si1i2) =>
                             let p1 := sq_1G^-1 s1ii2 in
                             match

                               return

                                  forall si1i3 : PathSquare ... ... ... ...,
                                  ... -> ...)

                                   (si1i3 : PathSquare ... ... ... ...)
                                   (X2 : ...) =>
                                 ...

                         end s0ii1 si1i1 X0
                     end s1ii1 si0i1 X)
                    (eisretr sq_1G s1ii1)^)
                 (eisretr sq_1G s0ii1)^)
              (eisretr sq_G1 si0i1)^
            :
            tr (fv s0ii1) @@h (si0i1 @@h tr s1ii1) =
            sq_ccGG (moveL_Vp (1 @ 1) 1 1 (sq_path^-1 1))
              (moveL_Vp (1 @ 1) 1 1 (sq_path^-1 1)) si1i1 ->
            PathCube s0ii1 s1ii1 1 1 si0i1 si1i1) x1
       end p00i0 p01i0 p10i0 p11i0 s0ii0 s1ii0 si0i0 si1i0) x

A: Type
x, x0: A
p00i, p01i, p10i, p11i: x = x0
s0ii: PathSquare 1 1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare 1 1 p10i p11i
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i 1 1
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i 1 1
(fun
   x1 : tr (fv s0ii) @@h (si0i @@h tr s1ii) =
        sq_ccGG (moveL_Vp (1 @ 1) 1 1 (sq_path^-1 1))
          (moveL_Vp (1 @ 1) 1 1 (sq_path^-1 1)) si1i =>
 match
   internal_paths_rew_r
     (fun si0i0 : PathSquare p00i p10i 1 1 =>
      PathSquare.tr
        (match
           p01i as p in (_ = a)
           return
             (forall px1 : a = x0,
              1 @ p00i = p @ px1 -> PathSquare 1 px1 p p00i)
         with
         | 1%path =>
             fun px1 : x = x0 =>
             match
               p00i as p in (_ = a)
               return
                 (forall px2 : x = a, 1 @ p = 1 @ px2 -> PathSquare 1 px2 1 p)
             with
             | 1%path =>
                 fun (px2 : x = x) (e : 1%path = 1 @ px2) =>
                 match
                   e @ concat_1p px2 in (_ = p)
                   return (1%path = 1 @ p -> PathSquare 1 p 1 1)
                 with
                 | 1%path => fun _ : 1%path = 1%path => 1
                 end e
             end px1
         end 1%path
           ((concat_1p p00i @
             ((((concat_1p p01i)^ @
                (match
                   s0ii in (@PathSquare _ a00 a10 a01 a11 p p0 p1 p2)
                   return (p @ p2 = p1 @ p0)
                 with
                 | @sq_id _ x2 => 1
                 end @ ((concat_p1 p00i)^)^))^)^)^) @
            (concat_p1 p01i)^)) @@h
      (si0i0 @@h PathSquare.tr s1ii) = si1i ->
      PathCube s0ii s1ii 1 1 si0i0 si1i)
     (internal_paths_rew_r
        (fun s0ii0 : PathSquare 1 1 p00i p01i =>
         PathSquare.tr
           (match
              p01i as p in (_ = a)
              return
                (forall px1 : a = x0,
                 1 @ p00i = p @ px1 -> PathSquare 1 px1 p p00i)
            with
            | 1%path =>
                fun px1 : x = x0 =>
                match
                  p00i as p in (_ = a)
                  return
                    (forall px2 : x = a,
                     1 @ p = 1 @ px2 -> PathSquare 1 px2 1 p)
                with
                | 1%path =>
                    fun (px2 : x = x) (e : 1%path = 1 @ px2) =>
                    match
                      e @ concat_1p px2 in (_ = p)
                      return (1%path = 1 @ p -> PathSquare 1 p 1 1)
                    with
                    | 1%path => fun _ : 1%path = 1%path => 1
                    end e
                end px1
            end 1%path
              ((concat_1p p00i @
                ((((concat_1p p01i)^ @
                   (match
                      s0ii0 in (@PathSquare _ a00 a10 a01 a11 p p0 p1 p2)
                      return (p @ p2 = p1 @ p0)
                    with
                    | @sq_id _ x2 => 1
                    end @ ((concat_p1 p00i)^)^))^)^)^) @
               (concat_p1 p01i)^)) @@h
         (sq_G1 (sq_G1^-1 si0i) @@h PathSquare.tr s1ii) = si1i ->
         PathCube s0ii0 s1ii 1 1 (sq_G1 (sq_G1^-1 si0i)) si1i)
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (fun s1ii0 : PathSquare 1 1 p10i p11i =>
            PathSquare.tr
              (match
                 p01i as p in (_ = a)
                 return
                   (forall px1 : a = x0,
                    1 @ p00i = p @ px1 -> PathSquare 1 px1 p p00i)
               with
               | 1%path =>
                   fun px1 : x = x0 =>
                   match
                     p00i as p in (_ = a)
                     return
                       (forall px2 : x = a,
                        1 @ p = 1 @ px2 -> PathSquare 1 px2 1 p)
                   with
                   | 1%path =>
                       fun (px2 : x = x) (e : 1%path = 1 @ px2) =>
                       match
                         e @ concat_1p px2 in (_ = p)
                         return (1%path = 1 @ p -> PathSquare 1 p 1 1)
                       with
                       | 1%path => fun _ : 1%path = 1%path => 1
                       end e
                   end px1
               end 1%path
                 ((concat_1p p00i @
                   ((((concat_1p p01i)^ @
                      (match
                         sq_1G (sq_1G^-1 s0ii) in
                         (@PathSquare _ a00 a10 a01 a11 p p0 p1 p2)
                         return (p @ p2 = p1 @ p0)
                       with
                       | @sq_id _ x2 => 1
                       end @ ((concat_p1 p00i)^)^))^)^)^) @
                  (concat_p1 p01i)^)) @@h
            (sq_G1 (sq_G1^-1 si0i) @@h PathSquare.tr s1ii0) = si1i ->
            PathCube (sq_1G (sq_1G^-1 s0ii)) s1ii0 1 1
              (sq_G1 (sq_G1^-1 si0i)) si1i)
           (fun
              X : PathSquare.tr
                    (match
                       p01i as p in (_ = a)
                       return

               (forall px1 : a = a11,

           with

      with
      | @sq_id _ x2 => 1
      end)^
     x1

   (@PathCube _ x000 x010 x100 x110 x001 x011 x101 x111 p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
    p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11 p00i0 p01i0 p10i0 p11i0 s0ii0 s1ii0 sii0 sii1 si0i0
    si1i0)

      with

          with
          | 1%path => 1%equiv

 end) ==

    (PathSquare.tr (fv s0ii0) @@h (si0i0 @@h PathSquare.tr s1ii0) =

with
| idcube x0 => 1%path
end = X

  by destruct X.
Defined.

Notation cu_path := equiv_cu_path.

Section Reflexivity.

  (** [PathCube] reflexivity *)

  Context {A} {a00 a10 a01 a11 : A}
    {px0 : a00 = a10} {px1 : a01 = a11}
    {p0x : a00 = a01} {p1x : a10 = a11}.

  (* Left right reflexivity *)
  
A: Type
a00, a10, a01, a11: A
px0: a00 = a10
px1: a01 = a11
p0x: a00 = a01
p1x: a10 = a11
s: PathSquare px0 px1 p0x p1x
PathCube s s hr hr hr hr

  
A: Type
a00, a10, a01, a11: A
px0: a00 = a10
px1: a01 = a11
p0x: a00 = a01
p1x: a10 = a11
s: PathSquare px0 px1 p0x p1x
PathCube s s hr hr hr hr

    by destruct s.
  Defined.

  (* Top bottom reflexivity *)
  
A: Type
a00, a10, a01, a11: A
px0: a00 = a10
px1: a01 = a11
p0x: a00 = a01
p1x: a10 = a11
s: PathSquare px0 px1 p0x p1x
PathCube hr hr s s vr vr

  
A: Type
a00, a10, a01, a11: A
px0: a00 = a10
px1: a01 = a11
p0x: a00 = a01
p1x: a10 = a11
s: PathSquare px0 px1 p0x p1x
PathCube hr hr s s vr vr

    by destruct s.
  Defined.

  (* Front back reflexivity *)
  
A: Type
a00, a10, a01, a11: A
px0: a00 = a10
px1: a01 = a11
p0x: a00 = a01
p1x: a10 = a11
s: PathSquare px0 px1 p0x p1x
PathCube vr vr vr vr s s

  
A: Type
a00, a10, a01, a11: A
px0: a00 = a10
px1: a01 = a11
p0x: a00 = a01
p1x: a10 = a11
s: PathSquare px0 px1 p0x p1x
PathCube vr vr vr vr s s

    by destruct s.
  Defined.

End Reflexivity.

(* Lemmas for rewriting faces of cubes *)
Section PathCubeRewriting.

  Context {A} {x000 x010 x100 x110 x001 x011 x101 x111 : A}
    {p0i0 : x000 = x010} {p1i0 : x100 = x110} {pi00 : x000 = x100}
    {pi10 : x010 = x110} {p0i1 : x001 = x011} {p1i1 : x101 = x111}
    {pi01 : x001 = x101} {pi11 : x011 = x111} {p00i : x000 = x001}
    {p01i : x010 = x011} {p10i : x100 = x101} {p11i : x110 = x111}
    {s0ii : PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i} {s1ii : PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i}
    {sii0 : PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10} {sii1 : PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11}
    {si0i : PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01} {si1i : PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11}.

  (* We write the most general version and derive special cases from this *)
  
A: Type
x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111
p00i: x000 = x001
p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
s0ii': PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii': PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0': PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1': PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i': PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i': PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
t0ii: s0ii = s0ii'
t1ii: s1ii = s1ii'
tii0: sii0 = sii0'
tii1: sii1 = sii1'
ti0i: si0i = si0i'
ti1i: si1i = si1i'
PathCube s0ii s1ii sii0 sii1 si0i si1i <~>
PathCube s0ii' s1ii' sii0' sii1' si0i' si1i'

  
A: Type
x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111
p00i: x000 = x001
p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
s0ii': PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii': PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0': PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1': PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i': PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i': PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
t0ii: s0ii = s0ii'
t1ii: s1ii = s1ii'
tii0: sii0 = sii0'
tii1: sii1 = sii1'
ti0i: si0i = si0i'
ti1i: si1i = si1i'
PathCube s0ii s1ii sii0 sii1 si0i si1i <~>
PathCube s0ii' s1ii' sii0' sii1' si0i' si1i'

    by destruct t0ii, t1ii, tii0, tii1, ti0i, ti1i.
  Defined.

  Context {s0ii' s1ii' sii0' sii1' si0i' si1i'}
    (t0ii : s0ii = s0ii') (t1ii : s1ii = s1ii') (tii0 : sii0 = sii0')
    (tii1 : sii1 = sii1') (ti0i : si0i = si0i') (ti1i : si1i = si1i').

  Definition equiv_cu_Gccccc := equiv_cu_GGGGGG t0ii 1 1 1 1 1.
  Definition equiv_cu_cGcccc := equiv_cu_GGGGGG 1 t1ii 1 1 1 1.
  Definition equiv_cu_ccGccc := equiv_cu_GGGGGG 1 1 tii0 1 1 1.
  Definition equiv_cu_cccGcc := equiv_cu_GGGGGG 1 1 1 tii1 1 1.
  Definition equiv_cu_ccccGc := equiv_cu_GGGGGG 1 1 1 1 ti0i 1.
  Definition equiv_cu_cccccG := equiv_cu_GGGGGG 1 1 1 1 1 ti1i.
  Definition equiv_cu_ccGGGG := equiv_cu_GGGGGG 1 1 tii0 tii1 ti0i ti1i.
  Definition equiv_cu_GGGGcc := equiv_cu_GGGGGG t0ii t1ii tii0 tii1 1 1.
  Definition equiv_cu_GGcccc := equiv_cu_GGGGGG t0ii t1ii 1 1 1 1.
  Definition equiv_cu_ccGGcc := equiv_cu_GGGGGG 1 1 tii0 tii1 1 1.
  Definition equiv_cu_ccccGG := equiv_cu_GGGGGG 1 1 1 1 ti0i ti1i.

End PathCubeRewriting.

Notation cu_GGGGGG := equiv_cu_GGGGGG.
Notation cu_Gccccc := equiv_cu_Gccccc.
Notation cu_cGcccc := equiv_cu_cGcccc.
Notation cu_ccGccc := equiv_cu_ccGccc.
Notation cu_cccGcc := equiv_cu_cccGcc.
Notation cu_ccccGc := equiv_cu_ccccGc.
Notation cu_cccccG := equiv_cu_cccccG.
Notation cu_ccGGGG := equiv_cu_ccGGGG.
Notation cu_GGGGcc := equiv_cu_GGGGcc.
Notation cu_GGcccc := equiv_cu_GGcccc.
Notation cu_ccGGcc := equiv_cu_ccGGcc.
Notation cu_ccccGG := equiv_cu_ccccGG.

(* Rotating top and bottom to front and back *)

A: Type
x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111
p00i: x000 = x001
p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
PathCube si0i si1i (tr s0ii) (tr s1ii) (tr sii0) (tr sii1) <~>
PathCube s0ii s1ii sii0 sii1 si0i si1i


A: Type
x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110

sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11

si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
PathCube si0i si1i (tr s0ii) (tr s1ii) (tr sii0) (tr sii1) <~>
PathCube s0ii s1ii sii0 sii1 si0i si1i

p00i: x000 = x001
p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
a:= tr s0ii: PathSquare p00i p01i p0i0 p0i1
PathCube si0i si1i a (tr s1ii) (tr sii0) (tr sii1) ->
PathCube (tr^-1 a) (tr^-1 (tr s1ii)) (tr^-1 (tr sii0)) 
  (tr^-1 (tr sii1)) si0i si1i

p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111

pi11: x011 = x111

p01i: x010 = x011

si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
a: PathSquare p00i p01i p0i0 p0i1
b: PathSquare p10i p11i p1i0 p1i1
c: PathSquare pi00 pi10 p0i0 p1i0
d: PathSquare pi01 pi11 p0i1 p1i1
cube: PathCube si0i si1i a b c d
PathCube (tr^-1 a) (tr^-1 b) (tr^-1 c) (tr^-1 d) si0i si1i

    by destruct cube. 
A: Type
x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111

p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
PathCube s0ii s1ii sii0 sii1 si0i si1i ->
PathCube si0i si1i (tr s0ii) (tr s1ii) (tr sii0) (tr sii1)
A: Type
x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111
p00i: x000 = x001
p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
(fun cube : PathCube si0i si1i (tr s0ii) (tr s1ii) (tr sii0) (tr sii1) =>
 cu_GGGGcc (eissect tr s0ii) (eissect tr s1ii) (eissect tr sii0)
   (eissect tr sii1)
   ((let a := tr s0ii in
     let b := tr s1ii in
     let c := tr sii0 in
     let d := tr sii1 in
     fun cube0 : PathCube si0i si1i a b c d =>
     match
       cube0 in
       (@PathCube _ x0001 x00 x0 x1 x0002 x002 x2 x3 p0i2 p1i2 pi001 pi0 p0i3
        p1i3 pi002 pi1 p00i0 p01i0 p10i0 p11i0 s0ii0 s1ii0 sii2 sii3 si0i0
        si1i0)
       return
         (PathCube (tr^-1 sii2) (tr^-1 sii3) (tr^-1 si0i0) 
            (tr^-1 si1i0) s0ii0 s1ii0)
     with
     | idcube x => (fun x0 : A => idcube x0) x
     end) cube))
o ?g == idmap
A: Type
x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111
p00i: x000 = x001
p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
?g
o (fun cube : PathCube si0i si1i (tr s0ii) (tr s1ii) (tr sii0) (tr sii1) =>
   cu_GGGGcc (eissect tr s0ii) (eissect tr s1ii) (eissect tr sii0)
     (eissect tr sii1)
     ((let a := tr s0ii in
       let b := tr s1ii in
       let c := tr sii0 in
       let d := tr sii1 in
       fun cube0 : PathCube si0i si1i a b c d =>
       match
         cube0 in
         (@PathCube _ x0001 x00 x0 x1 x0002 x002 x2 x3 p0i2 p1i2 pi001 pi0
          p0i3 p1i3 pi002 pi1 p00i0 p01i0 p10i0 p11i0 s0ii0 s1ii0 sii2 sii3
          si0i0 si1i0)
         return
           (PathCube (tr^-1 sii2) (tr^-1 sii3) (tr^-1 si0i0) 
              (tr^-1 si1i0) s0ii0 s1ii0)
       with
       | idcube x => (fun x0 : A => idcube x0) x
       end) cube)) ==
idmap

  
A: Type
x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111
p00i: x000 = x001
p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
(fun X : PathCube s0ii s1ii sii0 sii1 si0i si1i =>
 match
   X in
   (@PathCube _ x0001 x00 x0 x1 x0002 x002 x2 x3 p0i2 p1i2 pi001 pi0 p0i3
    p1i3 pi002 pi1 p00i0 p01i0 p10i0 p11i0 s0ii0 s1ii0 sii2 sii3 si0i0 si1i0)
   return (PathCube si0i0 si1i0 (tr s0ii0) (tr s1ii0) (tr sii2) (tr sii3))
 with
 | idcube x => (fun x0 : A => idcube x0) x
 end)
o (fun cube : PathCube si0i si1i (tr s0ii) (tr s1ii) (tr sii0) (tr sii1) =>
   cu_GGGGcc (eissect tr s0ii) (eissect tr s1ii) (eissect tr sii0)
     (eissect tr sii1)
     ((let a := tr s0ii in
       let b := tr s1ii in
       let c := tr sii0 in
       let d := tr sii1 in
       fun cube0 : PathCube si0i si1i a b c d =>
       match
         cube0 in
         (@PathCube _ x0001 x00 x0 x1 x0002 x002 x2 x3 p0i2 p1i2 pi001 pi0
          p0i3 p1i3 pi002 pi1 p00i0 p01i0 p10i0 p11i0 s0ii0 s1ii0 sii2 sii3
          si0i0 si1i0)
         return
           (PathCube (tr^-1 sii2) (tr^-1 sii3) (tr^-1 si0i0) 
              (tr^-1 si1i0) s0ii0 s1ii0)
       with
       | idcube x => (fun x0 : A => idcube x0) x
       end) cube)) ==
idmap

  
A: Type
x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111
p00i: x000 = x001
p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
(fun
   x : PathCube si0i si1i (tr (tr^-1 (tr s0ii))) (tr s1ii) 
         (tr sii0) (tr sii1) =>
 match
   cu_GGGGcc (eissect tr (tr^-1 (tr s0ii))) (eissect tr s1ii)
     (eissect tr sii0) (eissect tr sii1)
     ((let a := tr (tr^-1 (tr s0ii)) in
       let b := tr s1ii in
       let c := tr sii0 in
       let d := tr sii1 in
       fun cube : PathCube si0i si1i a b c d =>
       match
         cube in
         (@PathCube _ x0001 x00 x0 x1 x0002 x002 x2 x3 p0i2 p1i2 pi001 pi0
          p0i3 p1i3 pi002 pi1 p00i0 p01i0 p10i0 p11i0 s0ii0 s1ii0 sii2 sii3
          si0i0 si1i0)
         return
           (PathCube (tr^-1 sii2) (tr^-1 sii3) (tr^-1 si0i0) 
              (tr^-1 si1i0) s0ii0 s1ii0)
       with
       | idcube x0 => idcube x0
       end) x)
   in
   (@PathCube _ x0001 x00 x0 x1 x0002 x002 x2 x3 p0i2 p1i2 pi001 pi0 p0i3
    p1i3 pi002 pi1 p00i0 p01i0 p10i0 p11i0 s0ii0 s1ii0 sii2 sii3 si0i0 si1i0)
   return (PathCube si0i0 si1i0 (tr s0ii0) (tr s1ii0) (tr sii2) (tr sii3))
 with
 | idcube x0 => idcube x0
 end) ==
idmap

x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111
p00i: x000 = x001
p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
(fun
   x : PathCube si0i si1i (tr (tr^-1 (tr s0ii))) (tr (tr^-1 (tr s1ii)))
         (tr sii0) (tr sii1) =>
 match
   cu_GGGGcc (eissect tr (tr^-1 (tr s0ii))) (eissect tr (tr^-1 (tr s1ii)))
     (eissect tr sii0) (eissect tr sii1)
     ((let a := tr (tr^-1 (tr s0ii)) in
       let b := tr (tr^-1 (tr s1ii)) in
       let c := tr sii0 in
       let d := tr sii1 in
       fun cube : PathCube si0i si1i a b c d =>
       match
         cube in
         (@PathCube _ x0001 x00 x0 x1 x0002 x002 x2 x3 p0i2 p1i2 pi001 pi0
          p0i3 p1i3 pi002 pi1 p00i0 p01i0 p10i0 p11i0 s0ii0 s1ii0 sii2 sii3
          si0i0 si1i0)
         return
           (PathCube (tr^-1 sii2) (tr^-1 sii3) (tr^-1 si0i0) 
              (tr^-1 si1i0) s0ii0 s1ii0)
       with
       | idcube x0 => idcube x0
       end) x)
   in
   (@PathCube _ x0001 x00 x0 x1 x0002 x002 x2 x3 p0i2 p1i2 pi001 pi0 p0i3
    p1i3 pi002 pi1 p00i0 p01i0 p10i0 p11i0 s0ii0 s1ii0 sii2 sii3 si0i0 si1i0)
   return (PathCube si0i0 si1i0 (tr s0ii0) (tr s1ii0) (tr sii2) (tr sii3))
 with
 | idcube x0 => idcube x0
 end) ==
idmap

p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111
p00i: x000 = x001
p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111

s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
(fun
   x : PathCube si0i si1i (tr (tr^-1 (tr s0ii))) (tr (tr^-1 (tr s1ii)))
         (tr (tr^-1 (tr sii0))) (tr sii1) =>
 match
   cu_GGGGcc (eissect tr (tr^-1 (tr s0ii))) (eissect tr (tr^-1 (tr s1ii)))
     (eissect tr (tr^-1 (tr sii0))) (eissect tr sii1)
     ((let a := tr (tr^-1 (tr s0ii)) in
       let b := tr (tr^-1 (tr s1ii)) in
       let c := tr (tr^-1 (tr sii0)) in
       let d := tr sii1 in
       fun cube : PathCube si0i si1i a b c d =>
       match
         cube in
         (@PathCube _ x0001 x00 x0 x1 x0002 x002 x2 x3 p0i2 p1i2 pi001 pi0
          p0i3 p1i3 pi002 pi1 p00i0 p01i0 p10i0 p11i0 s0ii0 s1ii0 sii2 sii3
          si0i0 si1i0)
         return
           (PathCube (tr^-1 sii2) (tr^-1 sii3) (tr^-1 si0i0) 
              (tr^-1 si1i0) s0ii0 s1ii0)
       with
       | idcube x0 => idcube x0
       end) x)
   in
   (@PathCube _ x0001 x00 x0 x1 x0002 x002 x2 x3 p0i2 p1i2 pi001 pi0 p0i3
    p1i3 pi002 pi1 p00i0 p01i0 p10i0 p11i0 s0ii0 s1ii0 sii2 sii3 si0i0 si1i0)
   return (PathCube si0i0 si1i0 (tr s0ii0) (tr s1ii0) (tr sii2) (tr sii3))
 with
 | idcube x0 => idcube x0
 end) ==
idmap

  
A: Type
x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111
p00i: x000 = x001
p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
(fun
   x : PathCube si0i si1i (tr (tr^-1 (tr s0ii))) (tr (tr^-1 (tr s1ii)))
         (tr (tr^-1 (tr sii0))) (tr (tr^-1 (tr sii1))) =>
 match
   cu_GGGGcc (eissect tr (tr^-1 (tr s0ii))) (eissect tr (tr^-1 (tr s1ii)))
     (eissect tr (tr^-1 (tr sii0))) (eissect tr (tr^-1 (tr sii1)))
     ((let a := tr (tr^-1 (tr s0ii)) in
       let b := tr (tr^-1 (tr s1ii)) in
       let c := tr (tr^-1 (tr sii0)) in
       let d := tr (tr^-1 (tr sii1)) in
       fun cube : PathCube si0i si1i a b c d =>
       match
         cube in
         (@PathCube _ x0001 x00 x0 x1 x0002 x002 x2 x3 p0i2 p1i2 pi001 pi0
          p0i3 p1i3 pi002 pi1 p00i0 p01i0 p10i0 p11i0 s0ii0 s1ii0 sii2 sii3
          si0i0 si1i0)
         return
           (PathCube (tr^-1 sii2) (tr^-1 sii3) (tr^-1 si0i0) 
              (tr^-1 si1i0) s0ii0 s1ii0)
       with
       | idcube x0 => idcube x0
       end) x)
   in
   (@PathCube _ x0001 x00 x0 x1 x0002 x002 x2 x3 p0i2 p1i2 pi001 pi0 p0i3
    p1i3 pi002 pi1 p00i0 p01i0 p10i0 p11i0 s0ii0 s1ii0 sii2 sii3 si0i0 si1i0)
   return (PathCube si0i0 si1i0 (tr s0ii0) (tr s1ii0) (tr sii2) (tr sii3))
 with
 | idcube x0 => idcube x0
 end) ==
idmap

x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111
p00i: x000 = x001
p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
a:= tr s0ii: PathSquare p00i p01i p0i0 p0i1
(fun
   x : PathCube si0i si1i (tr (tr^-1 a)) (tr (tr^-1 (tr s1ii)))
         (tr (tr^-1 (tr sii0))) (tr (tr^-1 (tr sii1))) =>
 match
   cu_GGGGcc (eissect tr (tr^-1 a)) (eissect tr (tr^-1 (tr s1ii)))
     (eissect tr (tr^-1 (tr sii0))) (eissect tr (tr^-1 (tr sii1)))
     ((let a0 := tr (tr^-1 a) in
       let b := tr (tr^-1 (tr s1ii)) in
       let c := tr (tr^-1 (tr sii0)) in
       let d := tr (tr^-1 (tr sii1)) in
       fun cube : PathCube si0i si1i a0 b c d =>
       match
         cube in
         (@PathCube _ x0001 x00 x0 x1 x0002 x002 x2 x3 p0i2 p1i2 pi001 pi0
          p0i3 p1i3 pi002 pi1 p00i0 p01i0 p10i0 p11i0 s0ii0 s1ii0 sii2 sii3
          si0i0 si1i0)
         return
           (PathCube (tr^-1 sii2) (tr^-1 sii3) (tr^-1 si0i0) 
              (tr^-1 si1i0) s0ii0 s1ii0)
       with
       | idcube x0 => idcube x0
       end) x)
   in
   (@PathCube _ x0001 x00 x0 x1 x0002 x002 x2 x3 p0i2 p1i2 pi001 pi0 p0i3
    p1i3 pi002 pi1 p00i0 p01i0 p10i0 p11i0 s0ii0 s1ii0 sii2 sii3 si0i0 si1i0)
   return (PathCube si0i0 si1i0 (tr s0ii0) (tr s1ii0) (tr sii2) (tr sii3))
 with
 | idcube x0 => idcube x0
 end) ==
idmap

  
A: Type
x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111
p00i: x000 = x001
p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
a:= tr s0ii: PathSquare p00i p01i p0i0 p0i1
b:= tr s1ii: PathSquare p10i p11i p1i0 p1i1
(fun
   x : PathCube si0i si1i (tr (tr^-1 a)) (tr (tr^-1 b))
         (tr (tr^-1 (tr sii0))) (tr (tr^-1 (tr sii1))) =>
 match
   cu_GGGGcc (eissect tr (tr^-1 a)) (eissect tr (tr^-1 b))
     (eissect tr (tr^-1 (tr sii0))) (eissect tr (tr^-1 (tr sii1)))
     ((let a0 := tr (tr^-1 a) in
       let b0 := tr (tr^-1 b) in
       let c := tr (tr^-1 (tr sii0)) in
       let d := tr (tr^-1 (tr sii1)) in
       fun cube : PathCube si0i si1i a0 b0 c d =>
       match
         cube in
         (@PathCube _ x0001 x00 x0 x1 x0002 x002 x2 x3 p0i2 p1i2 pi001 pi0
          p0i3 p1i3 pi002 pi1 p00i0 p01i0 p10i0 p11i0 s0ii0 s1ii0 sii2 sii3
          si0i0 si1i0)
         return
           (PathCube (tr^-1 sii2) (tr^-1 sii3) (tr^-1 si0i0) 
              (tr^-1 si1i0) s0ii0 s1ii0)
       with
       | idcube x0 => idcube x0
       end) x)
   in
   (@PathCube _ x0001 x00 x0 x1 x0002 x002 x2 x3 p0i2 p1i2 pi001 pi0 p0i3
    p1i3 pi002 pi1 p00i0 p01i0 p10i0 p11i0 s0ii0 s1ii0 sii2 sii3 si0i0 si1i0)
   return (PathCube si0i0 si1i0 (tr s0ii0) (tr s1ii0) (tr sii2) (tr sii3))
 with
 | idcube x0 => idcube x0
 end) ==
idmap

  
A: Type
x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
pi01: x001 = x101
pi11: x011 = x111
p00i: x000 = x001
p01i: x010 = x011
p10i: x100 = x101
p11i: x110 = x111
s0ii: PathSquare p0i0 p0i1 p00i p01i
s1ii: PathSquare p1i0 p1i1 p10i p11i
sii0: PathSquare p0i0 p1i0 pi00 pi10
sii1: PathSquare p0i1 p1i1 pi01 pi11
si0i: PathSquare p00i p10i pi00 pi01
si1i: PathSquare p01i p11i pi10 pi11
a:= tr s0ii: PathSquare p00i p01i p0i0 p0i1
b:= tr s1ii: PathSquare p10i p11i p1i0 p1i1
c:= tr sii0: PathSquare pi00 pi10 p0i0 p1i0
(fun
   x : PathCube si0i si1i (tr (tr^-1 a)) (tr (tr^-1 b)) 
         (tr (tr^-1 c)) (tr (tr^-1 (tr sii1))) =>
 match
   cu_GGGGcc (eissect tr (tr^-1 a)) (eissect tr (tr^-1 b))
     (eissect tr (tr^-1 c)) (eissect tr (tr^-1 (tr sii1)))
     ((let a0 := tr (tr^-1 a) in
       let b0 := tr (tr^-1 b) in
       let c0 := tr (tr^-1 c) in
       let d := tr (tr^-1 (tr sii1)) in
       fun cube : PathCube si0i si1i a0 b0 c0 d =>
       match
         cube in
         (@PathCube _ x0001 x00 x0 x1 x0002 x002 x2 x3 p0i2 p1i2 pi001 pi0
          p0i3 p1i3 pi002 pi1 p00i0 p01i0 p10i0 p11i0 s0ii0 s1ii0 sii2 sii3
          si0i0 si1i0)
         return
           (PathCube (tr^-1 sii2) (tr^-1 sii3) (tr^-1 si0i0) 
              (tr^-1 si1i0) s0ii0 s1ii0)
       with
       | idcube x0 => idcube x0
       end) x)
   in
   (@PathCube _ x0001 x00 x0 x1 x0002 x002 x2 x3 p0i2 p1i2 pi001 pi0 p0i3
    p1i3 pi002 pi1 p00i0 p01i0 p10i0 p11i0 s0ii0 s1ii0 sii2 sii3 si0i0 si1i0)
   return (PathCube si0i0 si1i0 (tr s0ii0) (tr s1ii0) (tr sii2) (tr sii3))
 with
 | idcube x0 => idcube x0
 end) ==
idmap

x000, x010, x100, x110, x001, x011, x101, x111: A
p0i0: x000 = x010
p1i0: x100 = x110
pi00: x000 = x100
pi10: x010 = x110
p0i1: x001 = x011
p1i1: x101 = x111
